- SA = 3.63 (more difficult to synthesize)  
- Binding Affinity = -8.95 (better binding)

- Maximize QED (prefer molecule 2)  
- Minimize Binding Affinity (more negative is better, molecule 2 better)  
- Minimize SA (molecule 1 better)

Molecule 2 has better QED and binding but worse synth accessibility. Molecule 1 is easier to synthesize but has lower QED and affinity.

Strategy:  
- Start from molecule 2’s scaffold since it has better QED and affinity values.  
- Try to reduce SA by simplifying parts of the molecule, especially the bicyclic fused ring (the "C23C=NC=C2C=CN=C3" part) which is possibly increasing synthetic complexity.
